turns.thought: [OBSERVE] The swarm has converged to a point (gbest ~1.164e-05) with zero velocity, diversity near machine epsilon (9.28e-17), no improvement for 200 iterations. Fitness is essentially identical across particles (fitness_std 2.37e-19). The state is premature convergence. | [DIAGNOSE] The swarm prematurely converged to a non-optimal point because of loss of diversity and zero velocities, likely due to inertia weight decay or cognitive/social coefficients leading to collapse. This is a classic premature convergence on a simple unimodal function; the swarm stopped exploring before reaching the global optimum. | [STRATEGIZE] Inject diversity by randomly reinitializing a fraction of particles (0.5) across the search space with new velocities. Also set a moderately high inertia weight (1.1) to promote further exploration and prevent immediate re-collapse. This is better than levy_flight because Levy jumps around the current best might remain stuck if the current best is not a basin of the true optimum.
